meta.scenario: house +1 same BPM at 129 BPM, very sparse exit, T2 skips near-silent lead-in

transition_arc: Both 129.2 BPM. T1 exits from its sparsest section at bar 56 (energy already very low, percussion thinning). T2 from_bar=8 skips near-silent bars. Standard +1 Camelot at matching BPM — simplest possible blend. Energy stays flat through the window.

annotated_actions.t1_state: T1 bar 0: full 129 BPM groove, kick+bass, RMS 0.52
T1 bar 56: section=OUTRO-INTRO, drums=0.2, harmonic=0.15, rms=0.18 — very sparse, only filtered hi-hats, no kick, no bass
annotated_actions.t2_state: T2 bar 8: percussion only, sidestick+hh, bass=0.0
annotated_actions.why: T1 bar 56 is its sparsest section. Energy already very low. Fading barely changes the mix energy — ideal exit.

annotated_actions.t2_state: T2 bar 8: first real content (bars 0-7 near-silent), sidestick active
annotated_actions.why: T2 from_bar=8: skips 8-bar near-silent count-in. drums:0.8 brings in T2 sidestick texture under T1 hi-hats.

annotated_actions.t1_state: T1 bar 64: bass=0.0 (already gone at this sparse section), drums=0.1
annotated_actions.t2_state: T2 bar 16: bass emerging, kick established
annotated_actions.why: T1 bass already gone. Swap formalizes the transfer as T2 bass arrives.

annotated_actions.t2_state: T2 bar 24: full 129.2 BPM groove, kick+bass fully active, RMS 0.52
annotated_actions.why: T2 groove established. Tempo-matched transition complete.
